name: bestocr
description: bestOCR for agents: the bestocr-mcp MCP server (evidence-based multi-engine OCR — ocr with auto routing + fallback chain, recommend/list_engines/list_models, ocr_status/ocr_result async polling; notarized binary auto-downloaded on install) plus workflow skills (ocr — any PDF/image → Markdown; compare — local vs cloud reference; evidence-ingest — runlog → T2 gate). Recommendations are evidence-labelled, never guesses.
